Course Title: AI Transcription Tools in Healthcare Settings
Category: Healthcare & Life Sciences: Medical Services, Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Hospitals
Who is this for: Healthcare professionals, doctors, nurses, physician assistants, medical assistants, clinical staff, healthcare administrators, medical scribes, practice managers
Team or Dept this is for: Clinical Operations, Medical Records, Quality Assurance, Risk Management, Compliance, IT, Legal
Description: Privacy and accuracy risks in consultations and notes.
Prerequisites: Learners should have a basic familiarity with healthcare documentation practices and a general awareness of patient confidentiality obligations, but no prior experience with AI or transcription technology is required.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key privacy risks associated with using AI transcription tools during patient consultations and explain how inaccuracies in automated notes can affect clinical outcomes. You will also be able to apply practical strategies to safeguard patient data and evaluate the suitability of AI transcription tools within your healthcare setting.
